heading: Land acquisition plan

children.heading: Submission to Congressional committees; time; contents
children.label: a Submission to Congressional committees; time; contents
i
children.text: the lands and areas which he deems essential to the protection and public enjoyment of this park,

children.label: ii
children.text: the lands which he has previously acquired by purchase, donation, exchange, or transfer for the purpose of this park, and

children.label: iii
children.text: the annual acquisition program (including the level of funding) which he recommends for the ensuing five fiscal years.

children.heading: Congressional intent for land acquisition completion
children.label: b Congressional intent for land acquisition completion
children.text: It is the express intent of the Congress that the Secretary should substantially complete the land acquisition program contemplated by this subchapter within six years after .December 27, 1974
